title: Simple improvement to the User UI when clicking on an installed app in the marketplace

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
For uninstalled apps, then whole description is visible.

image1310×808 115 KB

As soon as you install it, you now need to click ‘show more’

image915×860 69.2 KB

There is often useful links in the ‘Show more’ section that people wouldn’t open after install. This means more support enquiries for the developers. Suggestion is to always have it expanded.
